name: TMDB Movies & TV
description: Search movies and TV shows, get details, and discover trending titles using The Movie Database (TMDB)

credentials_required.label: TMDB API Key (Bearer Token)
credentials_required.hint: Free at themoviedb.org/settings/api — use the 'API Read Access Token' (starts with 'ey...')

tools.name: search_tv
tools.description: Search for TV shows by title

tools.name: get_trending
tools.description: Get trending movies and TV shows

author: freddy-schuetz
